signals.reason: Live search flags a rare peak-summer allocation at ~€462 total for 7 nights (Half Board). Securing a week on a high-excitement Greek island for ~€66/night in July is incredible absolute value. The manageable 3.5h drive plus short ferry from Plovdiv is highly justified by the safe, family-friendly beach utility.

Mid-July mid-week rates have dropped to ~€102/night for a premium thermal spa. As a Tier 1 destination just 1.5 hours from Plovdiv, this zero-friction 3-night stay delivers massive immediate utility with dedicated indoor and outdoor kids' pools, perfect for a short, punchy family getaway.

Live SOF to FCO flights are a staggering €17 one-way on August 4. Paired with this resort-style property offering excellent on-site pools to cool off a 4-year-old, this creates a high-excitement 5-night European city break. The massive flight savings completely offset the Tier 2 transit friction of driving to Sofia.
